output.cypher: MATCH (i:Issue)-[:INVOLVES_COMPONENT]->(c:Component) MATCH (cause:Cause)-[:CAUSES]->(p:Phenomenon) WHERE c.canonical_name = '燃油泵' AND p.canonical_name CONTAINS '压力不足' OPTIONAL MATCH (doc:Document)-[:CONTAINS]->(:Chunk)-[:MENTIONS]->(cause) RETURN cause.canonical_name AS cause_name, collect(DISTINCT doc.document_id) AS source_doc_ids

MATCH (i:Issue)-[:INVOLVES_COMPONENT]->(c:Component) MATCH (cause:Cause)-[:CAUSES]->(p:Phenomenon) OPTIONAL MATCH (action:Action)-[:MITIGATES]->(cause) WHERE c.canonical_name = '液压泵' AND p.canonical_name CONTAINS '泄漏' RETURN i.issue_id AS issue_id, cause.canonical_name AS cause_name, collect(DISTINCT action.canonical_name) AS action_names

MATCH (i:Issue)-[:INVOLVES_COMPONENT]->(c:Component) MATCH (cause:Cause)-[:CAUSES]->(p:Phenomenon) OPTIONAL MATCH (action:Action)-[:MITIGATES]->(cause) WHERE c.canonical_name = '燃油泵' AND p.canonical_name CONTAINS '压力不足' RETURN i.issue_id AS issue_id, cause.canonical_name AS cause_name, collect(DISTINCT action.canonical_name) AS action_names
